creator: konstantin.t.i@ya.ru
text:
I created a specially new virtual machine, installed clean Debian 12 from scratch with the iso image "debian-12.5.0-amd64-netinst.iso".
The problem is reproducible.

Just for fun, try installing pure Debian 12 on bhyve.
https://cdimage.debian.org/debian-cd/current/amd64/iso-cd/debian-12.5.0-amd64-netinst.iso

Archived the directory "/vm/vm/debian12-test1" to the archive - https://disk.yandex.ru/d/Lp31Io92aFtDhA

Today, out of curiosity, I decided to run from a cloud image:
debian-12-nocloud-amd64-20240507-1740.raw
debian-12-nocloud-amd64-20240507-1740.qcow2
The problem is not reproduced on these images.
